controls.description: A clean validator-bound state may promote.
controls.falsification_condition: Fails if a clean positive control cannot promote.
controls.non_claim_lock: Negative control validation is repository-bound and does not prove code correctness, truth, AGI, consciousness, production readiness, security, external validation, or real-world correctness.

controls.description: A missing or failed required validator must block promotion.
controls.falsification_condition: Fails if a required validator failure can still promote.
controls.non_claim_lock: Negative control validation is repository-bound and does not prove code correctness, truth, AGI, consciousness, production readiness, security, external validation, or real-world correctness.

controls.description: False promote attempts must be rejected even if other surface language looks confident.
controls.non_claim_lock: Negative control validation is repository-bound and does not prove code correctness, truth, AGI, consciousness, production readiness, security, external validation, or real-world correctness.

controls.description: Weak but useful cases must downgrade instead of being erased or promoted.
controls.falsification_condition: Fails if downgrade-required case promotes or disappears.
controls.non_claim_lock: Negative control validation is repository-bound and does not prove code correctness, truth, AGI, consciousness, production readiness, security, external validation, or real-world correctness.

controls.description: Incomplete evidence should remain observable but non-promotional.
controls.non_claim_lock: Negative control validation is repository-bound and does not prove code correctness, truth, AGI, consciousness, production readiness, security, external validation, or real-world correctness.

non_claim_lock: Negative control validation is repository-bound and does not prove code correctness, truth, AGI, consciousness, production readiness, security, external validation, or real-world correctness.
